message:
I have this friend, bless her heart, who turns into a full-on tornado of panic whenever the weather starts to act up. Last winter, when they forecasted a little snow, she called me in a frenzy, convinced we were about to be buried alive. I mean, I appreciate her enthusiasm for being prepared, but sometimes I think she thinks we live in a post-apocalyptic movie! 

So, I took a deep breath, made some hot cocoa, and reminded her that a few extra blankets and some snacks could be all we really need to ride out a cozy storm. Sometimes, it’s just about keeping calm and looking at the bright side of a snow day! 

What’s your quirky go-to preparation tip for when the weather gets a bit wild?
